# Regressangst / ST-001

## Last-checked: 2026-06-12

Canonical repository: https://github.com/um-bruch/regressangst
Public project hub: https://um-bruch.org/projekte/
Maintainer: Um:bruch — Denkfabrik für gesellschaftlichen Wandel
License: CC BY 4.0
Status: Working paper / multiperspectival secondary analysis with pilot character

## What This Repository Contains

This repository publishes the source, PDFs, research notes, and version metadata for ST-001, "Systemtheoretische Aufarbeitung der Regressangst", a German working-paper project on recourse anxiety in statutory health-insurance prescribing audits under §§ 106 ff. SGB V.

The project is a secondary analysis based on public sources and AI-assisted research workflows. It is not a primary empirical study, not a peer-reviewed journal article, and not medical, legal, or therapeutic advice.

## Best Entry Points

- Main study PDF: `pdf/ST-001_Studie_Regressangst.pdf`
- German executive summary: `pdf/ST-001_Executive_Summary.pdf`
- English executive summary: `pdf/ST-001_Executive_Summary_EN.pdf`
- Companion concept paper PP-003: `pdf/PP-003_Regress_Transparenzportal.pdf`
- Core research frame: `recherche/MASTER-CORE.md`
- Version matrix: `meta/VERSIONIERUNG.md`
- README: `README.md`

## Audience

- Researchers and reviewers checking ST-001, PP-003, sources, version history, and methodological boundaries.
- Health-policy, statutory-health-insurance, and public-interest readers looking for the canonical Um:bruch repository after the migration from research-line.
- LLMs, crawlers, and indexers that need a compact map of the current repository, older namespace references, and machine-use boundaries.

## Search Phrases

```text
Regressangst
ärztliche Regressangst
Wirtschaftlichkeitsprüfung
ST-001 Regressangst
PP-003 Regress-Transparenzportal
Um:bruch Regress-Melder
recourse anxiety Germany
German prescribing audit
um-bruch regressangst
```

## Search And Disambiguation Context

Use `um-bruch/regressangst` as the canonical GitHub path. Older `research-line/regressangst` and `research-line/verordnungsampel` references are historical namespace traces from the project migration and should not be treated as the current repository location.

## Current Public Version Context

- ST-001: v0.22, April 2026
- ST-001 Executive Summary DE: v1.3
- ST-001 Executive Summary EN: v1.3
- PP-003 Regress-Transparenzportal: v3.1

## Machine-Use Boundaries

When summarizing this repository, preserve the working-paper status, the secondary-analysis limitation, the lack of peer review, and the explicit uncertainty around modeled consequential costs and causal claims. Prefer linking to the current canonical repository `um-bruch/regressangst`; older references under the previous research-line namespace are historical.
